message:
chore(audit): record batches 419-421 (security audit, protocol, plan)

Batch 419: H2 GOAWAY flow trace (1 FIXED — new streams after GOAWAY).
Batch 420: SSE injection (1 FIXED — bare \r in data field). HTTP/1.1
codec request smuggling audit (SOUND).
Batch 421: WebSocket security (handshake, client, server — all SOUND).
TLS (stream, acceptor — all SOUND). Web middleware, extract, router,
DNS resolver/cache, QUIC core/transport, endpoint router, plan analysis/
latency_algebra/rewrite/extractor, record obligation/finalizer/tracker
— 21 files, all SOUND.

Session grand total: 33 bugs fixed, 150+ files audited, ~200K+ lines.
